label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me see. The user wants to know if following these instructions brings them back to the starting point. Let's break down each step carefully. First, they take 7 steps. Assuming they're starting at the origin, facing forward, after 7 steps, they're 7 units away from the start in that direction. Then they turn around. Turning around 180 degrees would reverse their direction. So now they're facing back toward the starting point. Next,
